text: We are so happy to welcome everyone to version 3.0. There is tons to explore this update,
from verdant magic to ancient tomes, mysteries of the rainbow to mechanical marvels, this
pack has tons to offer! When you spawn you will be prompted to pick an Origin, be careful
as this will impact many gameplay systems in new ways. This update also adds a * light *
quest system (accessed in the top left of the inventory screen or by the questbook) where
you will be introduced to some of the new mods and features. Check back often for rewards!
We encourage you to build your main base within ~3000 blocks from spawn so that you can
